restaurant.name: Antico
restaurant.tagline: Life's Too Short For Average Food
restaurant.heroMessage: WE are open Wed to Sat. Spring is coming and the patio will be waiting!

contact.address: 6 Village Court, Sault Ste Marie, ON
contact.reservationNote: Use the reservation form on the main page to make a reservation. Just give us a few details about the size of your party, the occasion and the reservation time and we promise you a wonderful dining experience.

chef.name: Arturo Comegna
chef.title: Owner and Head Chef
chef.bio: Arturo Comegna was born in the small town of Casoli in the Abruzzo region of Italy. Arturo has always had a strong passion for fine Italian cuisine. From a young age he began perfecting his delicious recipes and started his culinary career at the age of 12.
chef.history: Art moved to Sault Ste. Marie where he followed his passion for food by acquiring Rico's restaurant on Spring St. Later Arturo opened the highly successful Arturo Ristoranté on Queen Street. Building on the success of Arturo's which is now owned by his sons Chris & Thomas he opened Antico Ristoranté in 2012.
chef.artNote: Antico is not only a testament to Arturo's incredible food skills, but also his artistic skills; the restaurant walls are used to display his beautiful paintings that he created over the years.
chef.celebrities: More than a few celebrities have joined Art in the kitchen over the years. Great Big Sea, Rankin Family, Maria Bello and Christopher Plummer just to name a few.

desserts.note: We always have delightful desserts to top off your dinner, these are always changing. Ask your server for details.
